name: X Bounty Tollbooth
description: Lets creators post proof-reviewed bounties for useful replies, memes, threads, research, Space notes, or feedback.
degenPitch: A bounty desk for useful community work.
whatItDoes: Creates compliant campaign or proof-review workflow.
Requires human approval and platform-rule compliance.
Uses receipt-gated rewards after proof review.
cursorPrompt: Build a X Bounty Tollbooth using DNA x402. Create a human-reviewed proof workflow, require proof URL or hash and timestamp, issue a receipt only after proof acceptance, never auto-post, never spam, and never use fake accounts.
suggestedPrompt: Build a X Bounty Tollbooth using DNA x402. Create a human-reviewed proof workflow, require proof URL or hash and timestamp, issue a receipt only after proof acceptance, never auto-post, never spam, and never use fake accounts.
